name: Lazy-Day Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs and sour cream; mix well.
3. Combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and nutmeg. Mix well into the batter.
4. Pour batter into a greased and floured 9x13-inch baking pan.
5. In a separate bowl, combine brown sugar, chopped pecans, and cinnamon.
6. Sprinkle half of this mixture over the cake batter, swirling it through.
7. Sprinkle the remaining mixture evenly over the cake batter.
8. Cover and chill overnight in the refrigerator.
9. Uncover and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 to 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
